MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-12-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-15-15 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Brenda Fields, CSR #7235.

Anthony F. Ventura, Esq. appeared with plaintiff James K. Hartin, who was placed under oath and examined.
Robert S. Fletcher, Esq. appeared with defendant Flordeliza H. Tarifa, who was placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was filed on December 17, 2009.

Settlement agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Ventura. In accordance with the terms of the agreement, the parties stipulated for judgment in favor of plaintiff James K. Hartin, and against defendant Flordeliza H. Tarifa. Judgment shall not be entered or enforced, provided defendant adheres to the following payment plan: (1) defendant shall pay plaintiff the sum of $300.00 per month from May 1, 2010 through April 30, 2015; (2) Defendant shall pay plaintiff the sum of $2,500.00 per month from May 1, 2015 through October 1, 2015; (3) All payments are due on the first day of each month, and made payable to plaintiff James K. Hartin, and (4) Each monthly payment shall be mailed to plaintiff's residence, located at 31345 Medinah Street, Hayward, CA 94544.

If defendant's monthly payments are not received by plaintiff by the 5th of each month, plaintiff may, upon ex parte application with twenty-four hours notice, obtain judgment against defendant. If defendant complies with the terms set forth above, plaintiff shall dismiss the case with prejudice. Each party shall bear their own fees & costs, except fees & costs incurred for enforcement of this agreement. Parties were voir dired by the Court as to the terms and his understanding of this settlement. This agreement shall be reduced to writing by Mr. Ventura.

Matter is continued to December 15, 2015 @ 10:00 a.m. in Dept. 212 on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar.
